name: psycle-class-finder-ios
description: Psycle Class Finder — iOS app via Capacitor

scripts.sync: cp ../index.html ../psycle-finder.html ../login.html ../manifest.json ../app.js ../calendar.js ../features.js ../interactions.js ../performance.js ../reliability.js ../security.js ../settings.js ../state.js ../tabs.js ../theme.js ../styles.css ../theme.css ../features.css ../tabs.css ../settings.css www/ && sed -i '' 's|</body>|<script src="native-bridge.js"></script>\n</body>|' www/psycle-finder.html && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build: npm run sync && npx cap open ios
